name: @umbraculum/i18n
description: Generic locale-bundle framework (TypeScript types + JSON bundles + copy-json build step). Platform + canonical namespaces only; brewery-vertical strings live in @umbraculum/brewery-i18n and merge in getSharedMessages().

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/locales.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-json.mjs
